title: ISO 8501 Surface Preparation Grades — A Practical Guide for Specifiers
excerpt: Choosing between Sa 1, Sa 2, Sa 2.5, and Sa 3 isn't academic — each grade changes coating adhesion, service life, and project cost by 20–40%.

title: 硅酮vs陶瓷耐高温涂料 — 项目工程师选型指南
excerpt: 两者均耐400°C以上，但化学体系、施工方式与成本差异显著。为项目工程师提供决策矩阵。

title: AAMA 2605 vs 2604 vs 2603 — What Architects Need to Know
excerpt: The three AAMA architectural coating specs govern exterior facade performance. Here's the real-world difference for tropical and coastal projects.
